allies.rationale_text: Cognitive-load-theory provides the mechanism behind expertise-reversal-effect by explaining how redundant guidance creates harmful load once expertise is high enough.
allies.source_quote: The Expertise Reversal Effect is a mental model rooted in cognitive science, specifically the constraints outlined by Cognitive Load Theory.

allies.rationale_text: Boundaries support expertise-reversal-effect by helping teams define where detailed guidance is still needed and where it has crossed into drag.
allies.source_quote: The model adds value when the system should deliberately remove supports that have become drag.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias makes expertise-reversal-effect worse when experts keep interpreting new cases through their entrenched schema instead of adapting support to the actual situation.
antagonists.source_quote: Experts are prone to seeking information that confirms their specialized view, reinforcing their existing schemas and leading to cognitive entrenchment.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Expertise-reversal-effect conflicts with simplification when simplified explanations appropriate for novices patronize experts and block the efficient compressed reasoning they need.
structured_tensions.source_quote: expertise-reversal-effect conflicts with simplification (simplification) when simplified explanations appropriate for novices patronize experts and block the efficient compressed reasoning they need.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Expertise-reversal-effect conflicts with curse-of-knowledge when adjusting communication for expertise level is undermined by the expert's inability to model what the novice does not yet know.
structured_tensions.source_quote: expertise-reversal-effect conflicts with curse-of-knowledge (curse of knowledge) when adjusting communication for expertise level is undermined by the expert's inability to model what the novice does not yet know.

curation_notes.summary: The source is strongest on its CLT grounding and on expert entrenchment risk, so the file stays sparse rather than forcing a bigger relation neighborhood.
donor_drops: Did not preserve AI-prompt or curse-of-knowledge relation sprawl where the current canonical target surface is thinner or less clean.
open_questions: The boundaries ally is reviewed normalization built from support-fit language rather than from a named explicit ally block.
